final:
// // This module implements a 1-bit DRAM cell where data is written only when write_enable is LOW
module dram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire data_in,
    output reg data_out
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (write_enable) begin
        data_out <= data_in; // Store data when writing is enabled
    end
    // If write_enable is low, data_out retains its value
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 1-bit DRAM cell where data is written only when write_enable is LOW
